trap: Uses moment (heavy lib) for date formatting and relative time
description: Replace heavy libs: moment -> date-fns or Intl

trap: Imports entire lodash library instead of specific functions
description: Replace heavy libs: lodash -> specific imports or native methods

trap: Barrel import from @/components imports all components, bloating bundle
description: Avoid barrel file imports; import components individually for tree-shaking

trap: Hero image is .png, not WebP/AVIF
description: Use WebP/AVIF formats for images (70% savings AVIF, 50% WebP)

trap: Hero img has no width/height attributes, causes CLS
description: Always set width/height or aspect-ratio on images to prevent CLS

trap: Hero image (LCP element) missing fetchpriority="high"
description: Eager load hero image with fetchpriority="high"

trap: Critical hero image is not preloaded via link rel="preload"
description: Preload critical LCP image via <link rel="preload">

trap: Product card images have no width/height attributes
description: Every image must have explicit width/height or aspect-ratio to prevent CLS

trap: Product grid images (below fold) missing loading="lazy"
description: Lazy load below-fold images with loading="lazy"

trap: Product images use .png instead of WebP/AVIF
description: Use WebP/AVIF for product images with fallbacks

trap: No srcset/sizes or <picture> element for responsive images
description: Use responsive images with <picture> and srcset with width descriptors

trap: Review avatar images have no width/height
description: All images including avatars must have explicit dimensions

trap: Review avatar images (far below fold) not lazy loaded
description: Lazy load below-fold images

trap: Brand partner images have no height attribute
description: Brand images need explicit width and height to prevent CLS

trap: Brand partner images (far below fold) not lazy loaded
description: Lazy load all below-fold images

trap: Footer CTA image has no width/height
description: Footer images must have explicit dimensions

trap: Footer CTA image not lazy loaded
description: Lazy load below-fold images including footer images

trap: Third-party scripts loaded synchronously without async/defer
description: Defer third-party scripts, use async/defer on all scripts

trap: Google Fonts loaded with display=block (render-blocking), should be swap
description: Use font-display: swap on all @font-face; Google Fonts link should use display=swap

trap: Google Fonts loaded from external CDN instead of self-hosted
description: Self-host fonts over Google Fonts to eliminate extra DNS+connection

trap: Primary font not preloaded with link rel="preload"
description: Preload primary font with <link rel="preload" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin>

trap: No preconnect hints for critical third-party origins
description: Preconnect to critical origins

trap: Scroll listener added without passive:true option
description: Unthrottled scroll listeners without passive:true are INP killers

trap: Scroll listener fires on every scroll event with no throttle/rAF
description: Throttle scroll/resize handlers with requestAnimationFrame

trap: Scroll event listener never cleaned up (missing useEffect return)
description: Always clean up event listeners to prevent memory leaks

trap: Synchronous localStorage read in useEffect during initial render path
description: No synchronous localStorage/sessionStorage reads in render path

trap: Modal, Sidebar, and other non-critical components not lazy loaded
description: Code split by route, lazy load non-critical components

trap: No CSS containment used on product grid or sections for layout isolation
description: Use CSS containment for layout isolation on repeating elements

trap: Float animation runs unconditionally, no prefers-reduced-motion check
description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — disable animations

trap: Promo banner has 4 em-dashes in one paragraph
description: Ban em-dash overuse: max 1 per paragraph, replace with commas/periods

trap: All images served from local /images/ path instead of CDN
description: Deliver images via CDN

trap: No cache headers configured for static image/font assets
description: Cache immutable static assets 1yr with hashed filenames

trap: All sections (reviews, brands, footer CTA) rendered eagerly upfront
description: Never load everything upfront; lazy load non-critical resources
